_note: Fake First-Proof-style problem list for the firstproof_smoke_fast / firstproof_smoke_full workflows. Each entry is a syntactically valid input.json item; the LaTeX bodies are designed to exercise different code paths in scripts/firstproof_entrypoint.py and the Author/Critic loop. See smoke/README.md for which path each problem targets.

problems.latex: Problem 7 (smoke -- malformed wrapper). The input here is deliberately NOT a complete LaTeX document: there is no \documentclass, no \begin{document}, and no closing \end{document}. The task itself is well-defined though: prove that the harmonic series $\sum_{n=1}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n}$ diverges, using the classical grouping-by-powers-of-two argument due to Oresme. The entrypoint should still produce a compilable output by wrapping the response in the standard 12pt article preamble.
